glosses.yue: 與此同時; 而家已經
glosses.ja: その間に; いまでは

sentences.target: Mittlerweile habe ich den Schlüssel wiedergefunden.

translations.de: Mittlerweile habe ich den Schlüssel wiedergefunden.
translations.en: By now I've found the key again.
translations.es: Ya encontré la llave otra vez.
translations.zh-Hans: 我现在又把钥匙找到了。
translations.yue: 我而家又搵返到條鎖匙。
translations.pt: Já encontrei a chave de novo.
translations.vi: Giờ tôi đã tìm lại được chìa khóa.
translations.nl: Ik heb de sleutel weer gevonden.
translations.hi: अब मुझे चाबी फिर से मिल गई है.
translations.nb: Nå har jeg funnet nøkkelen igjen.
translations.id: Sekarang aku sudah menemukan kuncinya lagi.
translations.sv: Nu har jag hittat nyckeln igen.
translations.ro: Acum am găsit din nou cheia.
translations.da: Nu har jeg fundet nøglen igen.

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb indicating a change over time; clause-level modifier.
Finite auxiliary verb (1st person singular present) forming the Perfekt.
Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular subject.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular.
Common noun; direct object in accusative masculine singular.
Past participle of separable verb; main verb in Perfekt; clause-final position.

sentences.target: Ich wohne mittlerweile in einer ruhigeren Gegend.

translations.de: Ich wohne mittlerweile in einer ruhigeren Gegend.
translations.en: I live in a quieter neighborhood now.
translations.es: Ahora vivo en un barrio más tranquilo.
translations.fr: J’habite maintenant dans un quartier plus calme.
translations.it: Adesso vivo in una zona più tranquilla.
translations.ko: 이제 더 조용한 동네에 살고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我现在住在更安静的社区。
translations.yue: 我而家住喺較靜嘅地區。
translations.ru: Теперь я живу в более тихом районе.
translations.pt: Agora moro em um bairro mais tranquilo.
translations.he: עכשיו אני גר בשכונה שקטה יותר.
translations.tr: Artık daha sakin bir mahallede yaşıyorum.
translations.vi: Giờ tôi sống ở khu phố yên tĩnh hơn.
translations.ar: أنا الآن أسكن في حي أهدأ.
translations.nl: Ik woon nu in een rustigere buurt.
translations.uk: Тепер я живу в тихішому районі.
translations.hi: अब मैं एक शांत इलाके में रहता हूँ.
translations.el: Τώρα μένω σε μια πιο ήσυχη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: Nå bor jeg i et roligere nabolag.
translations.id: Sekarang saya tinggal di lingkungan yang lebih tenang.
translations.sv: Nu bor jag i ett lugnare område.
translations.ro: Acum locuiesc într-un cartier mai liniștit.
translations.da: Nu bor jeg i et roligere kvarter.
translations.ja: 今はもっと静かな地域に住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular subject.
Finite main verb (1st person singular present) indicating residence.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to show current state.
Preposition governing dative; indicates static location.
Indefinite article; dative feminine singular.
Comparative adjective; attributive, agrees with feminine dative noun.
Common noun; object of the preposition in a locative PP.

sentences.target: Er ist mittlerweile sicherer auf Deutsch.

translations.de: Er ist mittlerweile sicherer auf Deutsch.
translations.en: He's more confident in German now.
translations.es: Ahora se siente más seguro en alemán.
translations.fr: Il est plus à l’aise en allemand maintenant.
translations.it: Ora si sente più sicuro in tedesco.
translations.zh-Hans: 他现在说德语更有自信了。
translations.pt: Agora ele está mais confiante em alemão.
translations.he: עכשיו הוא מרגיש בטוח יותר בגרמנית.
translations.vi: Giờ cậu ấy tự tin hơn với tiếng Đức.
translations.ar: هو الآن أكثر ثقة باللغة الألمانية.
translations.nl: Hij voelt zich nu zekerder in het Duits.
translations.hi: अब वह जर्मन में ज़्यादा आत्मविश्वासी है.
translations.pl: Teraz czuje się pewniej po niemiecku.
translations.el: Τώρα είναι πιο σίγουρος στα γερμανικά.
translations.nb: Nå er han tryggere på tysk.
translations.id: Sekarang dia lebih percaya diri dalam bahasa Jerman.
translations.sv: Nu är han mer självsäker på tyska.
translations.ro: Acum este mai încrezător în germană.
translations.da: Nu er han mere selvsikker på tysk.
translations.ja: 彼は今ドイツ語にもっと自信がある。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 3rd person singular masculine subject.
Copular auxiliary; finite 3rd person singular present.
Temporal adverb; indicates a state reached over time.
Comparative adjective used predicatively.
Preposition introducing a manner PP ('in German').
Proper noun treated as common noun; complement of 'auf'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder schlafen mittlerweile ohne Nachtlicht.

translations.de: Die Kinder schlafen mittlerweile ohne Nachtlicht.
translations.en: The kids sleep without a nightlight now.
translations.es: Ahora los niños duermen sin luz nocturna.
translations.fr: Les enfants dorment maintenant sans veilleuse.
translations.it: Ora i bambini dormono senza luce notturna.
translations.ko: 이제 아이들은 야간 조명 없이 잠들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们现在不用小夜灯睡觉了。
translations.yue: 而家啲細路唔開夜燈都瞓得着。
translations.pt: Agora as crianças dormem sem luz noturna.
translations.he: עכשיו הילדים ישנים בלי אור לילה.
translations.tr: Artık çocuklar gece lambası olmadan uyuyor.
translations.vi: Giờ bọn trẻ ngủ mà không cần đèn ngủ.
translations.ar: الآن الأطفال ينامون دون مصباح ليلي.
translations.nl: De kinderen slapen nu zonder nachtlampje.
translations.hu: A gyerekek most már éjszakai fény nélkül alszanak.
translations.hi: अब बच्चे बिना नाइट लाइट के सोते हैं।
translations.pl: Dzieci teraz śpią bez lampki nocnej.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά τώρα κοιμούνται χωρίς νυχτερινό φωτάκι.
translations.id: Sekarang anak-anak tidur tanpa lampu tidur.
translations.ro: Acum copiii dorm fără lampă de veghe.
translations.cs: Teď děti spí bez noční lampičky.
translations.ja: 今は子どもたちは常夜灯なしで寝ています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative plural.
Common noun; plural subject of the verb schlafen.
Finite main verb; 3rd person plural present.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Preposition governing accusative; expresses absence of something.
Common noun; accusative object of the preposition ohne.
